title: First Listen (Design Concept)
description: Prove you listened to at least N songs on Smol without revealing which songs or your listening history.
smartWallet: any — uses your connected Smol wallet
scheme: Planned — Groth16 counter proof with nullifiers (BN254)

designOutputs.listenThreshold: Boolean — user listened to at least N unique songs

verification: On-chain via Protocol 25 BN254 pairing check. Listen data sourced from Smol player events.
note: Design concept. Would prove platform engagement without exposing listening habits, enabling anonymous music discovery reputation.
